mnemonics.title: Memory Hierarchy Order
mnemonics.content: Really Cool Machines Read Stories - Registers, Cache, Main Memory, Secondary Storage

mnemonics.title: CPU Components
mnemonics.content: Cats Always Run - Control Unit, ALU, Registers

mnemonics.title: Interrupt Handling Steps
mnemonics.content: Finish Important Jobs Carefully - Finish current instruction, Identify interrupt, Jump to ISR, Continue execution
